pi_items.source: Mathematical calculation from task specification: base plate 50×30×3 mm, fins 50×1×15 mm each, 6 fins. Bounding box = [max(X)=50, max(Y)=30, max(Z)=3+15=18]
Standard CAD tolerance for dimensioning, reasonable for ±2mm variation on 50mm features
Mathematical calculation: base_volume = 50×30×3 = 4500 mm³; fin_volume = 50×1×15 = 750 mm³/fin × 6 = 4500 mm³ total; total = 4500 + 4500 = 9000 mm³
Reasonable 20% tolerance on volume for parametric CAD models. Tolerance range: 7200-10800 mm³
Task description Step 4 explicitly states: 'Use the LinearPattern feature to create an array of 6 fins along the width (Y-axis) with a pitch (spacing) of 5 mm.'
Task description explicitly states: 'create an array of 6 fins' with LinearPattern. Final dimensions section confirms 'Fin Count: 6'
Task description Step 5: 'Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/heatsink.FCStd'. Also confirmed in export_result.sh line 15

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic parametric CAD modeling task with no external data sources. All metadata claims are mathematically verified: the expected bounding box of 50×30×18 mm is correct (base plate 50×30×3 mm plus 15 mm fins), expected volume of 9000 mm³ is correct (4500 mm³ base + 4500 mm³ fins), the task requires LinearPattern feature for creating 6 evenly-spaced fins with 5 mm pitch along the Y-axis. All tolerances (±2 mm for bbox, ±20% for volume) are reasonable for CAD verification.
